#   glyphplotter --input A657.txt --output A657.svg \

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+A657
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 322 0 /uniA657
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+A657"
move 1400
